title: crepis japonica
intro: Crepis japonica, also known as Japanese hawk's beard or Japanese dandelion, is a plant species within the dandelion family (Asteraceae) native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant's leaves, roots, and flowers are used in herbal preparations to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Crepis japonica include reducing inflammation, improving liver function, and supporting the immune system.
